sub_problems: Characterize known LLM failure modes as oscillations in output-token-probability space and measure their 'resonant frequency' (cycle length, amplitude growth rate).

Train small sidecar networks each tuned to a single failure-mode signature; verify that, when run in parallel with the base model, the sidecar produces an opposing output that cancels the failure amplification.
Evaluate that the multi-damper system covers a broad failure spectrum without degrading on-policy responses.
